title: OpenSSL SSL_select_next_proto Buffer Overread
description: Buffer overread in SSL_select_next_proto allows remote attackers to trigger crash or data exposure via ALPN negotiation.
resolution: Upgrade OpenSSL to 3.2.2+. Apply vendor patches immediately.

title: Apache HTTP Server SSRF on Windows
description: Server Side Request Forgery vulnerability in Apache httpd on Windows allows proxy abuse.
resolution: Upgrade to Apache httpd 2.4.60. Restrict UNC paths in config.

title: Certifi Removal of e-Tugra Root Certificate
description: Certifi python package contained e-Tugra root CA enabling MITM on TLS connections.
resolution: Upgrade certifi to 2024.7.4+. Audit TLS certificate chains.

title: urllib3 Proxy-Authorization Header Leak
description: urllib3 forwards Proxy-Authorization headers to destination servers when redirected.
resolution: Upgrade urllib3 to 2.2.2+. Audit proxy configurations.

title: pypa/setuptools Remote Code Execution
description: Arbitrary code execution via malicious package URL in package_index module.
resolution: Upgrade setuptools to 70.3.0+. Audit all package sources.

title: libexpat XML Parsing Crash
description: Negative length in XML_ParseBuffer in libexpat allows remote code execution via crafted XML.
resolution: Upgrade libexpat to 2.6.3+. Validate XML input at boundary.

title: Python zipfile Infinite Loop DoS
description: Infinite loop in zipfile module when processing malformed ZIP with zero-size extra field.
resolution: Upgrade Python to 3.12.5+. Validate ZIP files before processing.

title: Jenkins Arbitrary File Read via Agent
description: Jenkins agents can read arbitrary files from the controller filesystem via ClassLoaderProxy.
resolution: Upgrade Jenkins to 2.471+. Restrict agent-to-controller access.

title: Spring Framework Path Traversal
description: Path traversal in Spring MVC and WebFlux when serving static resources via RouterFunctions.
resolution: Upgrade to Spring Framework 6.1.12+. Apply security filters.

title: Apache Commons IO Infinite Loop
description: Uncontrolled resource consumption via XmlStreamReader in Apache Commons IO.

title: Apache Commons Configuration Stack Overflow
description: Stack overflow in ListDelimiterHandler causes DoS via crafted configuration values.
resolution: Upgrade to 2.10.1+. Restrict configuration input sources.

title: Apache Tomcat Authentication Bypass
description: Improper error handling in Tomcat Jakarta authentication allows auth bypass without credentials.
resolution: Upgrade to Tomcat 11.0.0-M21+. Apply immediately - active exploitation.
